sglang.author: anvdn
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
~1 month ago, I opened the following issue. Essentially, this older change introduced (I am assuming inadvertently) a regression by adding a runtime error if we can't preload CUDA runtime from system dirs. Unfortunately, this binary isn't always present there, in particular if the CUDA to

sglang.title: Fix duplicate download log messages in multi-process environment
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

When running with multiple processes (e.g., DP=8), find_local_hf_snapshot_dir() was using logger.info() causing all processes to print the same download-related messages
Changed 6 logger.info() calls to use log_info_on_rank0() which only logs on tensor parallel rank 0
This reduces log noise

sglang.author: alisonshao

Summary
This PR reverts PR #14044 to test if it resolves the TestQwen3NextPiecewiseCudaGraph failure on H100 (accuracy=0.0, invalid=1.0).
Hypothesis: PR #14044 may have caused the issue by:

Sharing memory pool between piecewise and main cuda graph runners (instead of separate pools)
A potential bug

sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Adds a new slash command /rerun-stage <stage-name> that allows developers to run individual test stages immediately, skipping dependencies. This is perfect for quick iterations when fixing specific test failures.
Usage
/rerun-stage unit-test-backend-4-gpu

This will:

✅ Run only the 4-gpu test stage

vllm.author: Jasen2201
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix flaky test_bad_words test caused by tokenizer encode/decode asymmetry.
The test was failing on AMD CI (see #27945) because modern tokenizers (e.g., LLaMA's SentencePiece) use positional markers (like ▁ prefix) that distinguish tokens in different contexts. When these tokens are decoded,

vllm.title: [BugFix] add max-num-batched-token to scheduler hash
vllm.author: BoyuanFeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Before this PR, max-num-batched-token is not added to compute_hash by default, which decides whether recompile if this config changes.
However, max_num_batched_tokens need to be included in the hash due to two reasons:

LoRA creates static buffers based on max_num_batched_tokens. The tensor sizes an

vllm.title: [Docs] Discuss api key limitations in security guide
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The use of --api-key only applies to the OpenAI-comaptible API
endpoints under v1/. It does not apply to other endpoints exposed
via the same HTTP server in vLLM. This doc update discusses why it is
important not to rely on --api-key exclusively for securing access
to vLLM.
Signed-off-by: Russell Br

Since vllm.multimodal.utils.fetch_* is only supposed to be called directly by user code, allow those functions to access local files by default as it doesn't constitute a security vulnerability. This lets us simplify the code in vllm-project/vllm-omni#131 and vllm-project/vllm-omni#167 late

vllm.title: [responsesAPI] support input output messages for non harmony models
vllm.author: qandrew
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The responsesAPI reasoning / tool calling parser may not always be correct (ie Q1 in https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking/blob/main/docs/tool_call_guidance.md). We should provide support to show the raw token in / token out as optional additional payload in responsesAPI.
